title: Unique Bitter Japanese Tofu Noodles
description: A bitter, tender, and energizing Japanese dish featuring malt vinegar and bhuna, perfect for vegetarians. This recipe combines the unique flavors of Japan with the spicy kick of bhuna.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Cook the Japanese noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the cubed tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Add the bhuna spice mix and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the malt vinegar, soy sauce, and grated ginger, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and toss to coat with the sauce.
Transfer the noodles to a serving dish and garnish with thinly sliced green onions.
